description: Scale the homebrew beer recipe from 5 gallons to 3 gallons and calculate the ABV. Record the scaled ingredients and the calculated ABV to /home/ga/Documents/scaled_recipe.txt.

natural_language.prompt: You have a 5-gallon homebrew beer recipe that needs to be scaled down to 3 gallons. Calculate the scale factor, apply it to all ingredients, and calculate the expected ABV using the brewing formula.
